creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 157534
Patch to update science/InsightToolkit to 4.7.2

I have updated the distinfo file to fix this patch.
I compared the new sources against those I had initially used, and found the only difference was the update of the ITK_VERSION_PATCH parameter found in the git commit:
http://itk.org/gitweb?p=ITK.git;a=commitdiff;h=8d58556089399c11d51795d46d6b17c355af95dc
